---
name: Epic
about: Coordinate a phase or major workstream
title: "Epic: "
labels:
  - enhancement
  - type:epic
---

## Outcome

What should be true when this epic is complete?

## Why This Matters

How does this move Discogenius forward relative to the roadmap?

## Non-Goals

What is explicitly out of scope for this epic?

## Child Issues

- [ ] Linked implementation and RFC issues go here

## Exit Criteria

- [ ] The intended outcome is delivered
- [ ] Superseded workarounds or temporary paths are removed or tracked explicitly
- [ ] Docs and operator guidance are updated where needed
